name: table
title: Table
description: A highly customizable neo-brutalist Table component built with Brutx design tokens for Vue 3.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableBodyProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableBodyProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(
        '[&_tr:last-child]:border-0',
        '[&_tr:nth-child(even)]:bg-brutal-muted',
        props.class
    )
)
</script>

<template>
    <tbody :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </tbody>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableCaptionProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableCaptionProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn('mt-4 text-sm font-bold text-brutal-muted-foreground', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <caption :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </caption>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableFooterProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableFooterProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn('border-t-3 border-brutal bg-brutal-secondary font-bold [&>tr]:last:border-b-0', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <tfoot :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </tfoot>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableHeadProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableHeadProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(
        'h-12 px-4 text-left align-middle font-black tracking-wide text-brutal-fg bg-brutal-accent',
        '[&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0',
        'border-r-3 border-brutal last:border-r-0',
        props.class
    )
)
</script>

<template>
    <th :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </th>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableHeaderProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableHeaderProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn('bg-brutal-accent text-brutal-fg [&_tr]:border-b-3 [&_tr]:border-brutal', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <thead :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </thead>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface TableRowProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<TableRowProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(
        'border-b-3 border-brutal transition-colors',
        'hover:bg-brutal-accent/30',
        'data-[state=selected]:bg-brutal-accent',
        props.class
    )
)
</script>

<template>
    <tr :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </tr>
</template>
